jobs.title: PRADA Assistant Store Manager
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 Job Summary/Purposes : 

 
 

 
 The Assistant Store Manager has the ability of promoting brand loyalty to customers in the luxury goods sector, in order to guarantee the quantitative and qualitative objectives assigned. He/she represents the Company and acts as a representative of the Store Manager ensuring the implementation of all directions received from the Retail Department and Store Manager. 

 
 

 
 Responsibilities: 

 
 

 
 Sales 

 
 

 
 

• Is constantly up-to-date regarding fashion trends, knows and monitors competitors and communicates this information to the Sales Staff.
 

• Reflects the corporate image in terms of standing and ensures that the Staff is also aligned.
 

• Supports the Store Manager in guaranteeing excellent customer welcome and service and in maintaining the qualitative standards required by our brand.
 
 
 

• 
 

• Supports the Store Manager in reporting all significant information to the Area Manager.
 
 

 
 
 

 
 Customer management and CRM 

 
 

 
 

• 
 

• Personally manages all critical situations regarding customer complaints and after-sales service.
 

• Promotes customer loyalty.
 

• Coordinates the management of Top clients as well as VIPs with the Store Manager.
 
 

 
 
 

 
 Store Staff 

 
 

 
 

• Supports the Store Manager in building the team and coordinating the activities in order to make sure that team members are always motivated and competent.
 
 
 

• Ensures professional growth and training of the staff, sharing development plans with the Store Manager.
 

• Supports the Store Manager and Department Managers in the definition of quantitative and qualitative objectives and ensures they are achieved by analyzing results, verifying monthly activities and setting up yearly assessments.
 

• Prepares the Store Planning and submits it to the Store Manager for approval.
 

• Manages Department Managers and supports them in their activities.
 

• Makes sure that internal procedures are followed.
 
 
 

 
 Product 

 
 

 
 

• Ensures that the Store image and product care are in line with corporate standards and that the Staff is made to feel responsible to maintain these standards .
 
 
 

• Knows in depth all the products for each category
 
 
 

 
 Visual 

 
 

 
 

• Ensures that the Store windows are always in good order and prepares product display strictly complying with the Company directions and following the indications provided by the Store Manager.
 
 
 

 
 Stockroom 

 
 

 
 

• Optimises stockroom management in order to make sure that stocks are stored as efficiently as possible in terms of sales, in cooperation with the stockroom staff.
 
 
 

• Supervises and reports any discrepancies to the Store Manager.
 

• Verifies the correct rotation of goods in the stockroom.
 

• Provides the Stationary orders with the contingent Stock support
 

• Supports the Store Manager in the management of all activities connected with year-end, sector and rotation stock takes by product category.
 
 
 

 
 Procedures 

 
 

 
 

• Takes any measures to guarantee the care of all valuable products and materials in the store, in cooperation with the Stock Manager.
 
 
 

• Liaises with the Store Manager to report and manage any loss (thefts of products, money, etc.).
 

• Liaises with the Store Manager to train the Store Staff to prevent losses and thefts.
 
 
 

 
 Reporting 

 
 

 
 

• Provides and analyses the main reports in terms of sales, products, staff performances, CRM and Stock.
 
 
 

• Supports the Department Manager the reporting activity.
 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities.

## Mansioni

### Sales
- Is constantly up-to-date regarding fashion trends, knows and monitors competitors and communicates this information to the Sales Staff.
- Reflects the corporate image in terms of standing and ensures that the Staff is also aligned.
- Supports the Store Manager in guaranteeing excellent customer welcome and service and in maintaining the qualitative standards required by our brand.
- Supports the Store Manager in reporting all significant information to the Area Manager.

### Customer management and CRM
- Personally manages all critical situations regarding customer complaints and after-sales service.
- Promotes customer loyalty.
- Coordinates the management of Top clients as well as VIPs with the Store Manager.

### Store Staff
- Supports the Store Manager in building the team and coordinating the activities in order to make sure that team members are always motivated and competent.
- Ensures professional growth and training of the staff, sharing development plans with the Store Manager.
- Supports the Store Manager and Department Managers in the definition of quantitative and qualitative objectives and ensures they are achieved by analyzing results, verifying monthly activities and setting up yearly assessments.
- Prepares the Store Planning and submits it to the Store Manager for approval.
- Manages Department Managers and supports them in their activities.
- Makes sure that internal procedures are followed.

### Product
- Ensures that the Store image and product care are in line with corporate standards and that the Staff is made to feel responsible to maintain these standards .
- Knows in depth all the products for each category

### Visual
- Ensures that the Store windows are always in good order and prepares product display strictly complying with the Company directions and following the indications provided by the Store Manager.

### Stockroom
- Optimises stockroom management in order to make sure that stocks are stored as efficiently as possible in terms of sales, in cooperation with the stockroom staff.
- Supervises and reports any discrepancies to the Store Manager.
- Verifies the correct rotation of goods in the stockroom.
- Provides the Stationary orders with the contingent Stock support
- Supports the Store Manager in the management of all activities connected with year-end, sector and rotation stock takes by product category.

### Procedures
- Takes any measures to guarantee the care of all valuable products and materials in the store, in cooperation with the Stock Manager.
- Liaises with the Store Manager to report and manage any loss (thefts of products, money, etc.).
- Liaises with the Store Manager to train the Store Staff to prevent losses and thefts.

### Reporting
- Provides and analyses the main reports in terms of sales, products, staff performances, CRM and Stock.
- Supports the Department Manager the reporting activity.

## Requisiti
No clear requirements listed.

## Cosa offriamo
- Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence.
- The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth.
- Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics.

## Contatto
No contact information provided.

jobs.title: PRADA Sales Assistant (m/f/d)
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Church’s and Car Shoe brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities.

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 We are seeking a passionate and dedicated Sales Associate (m/f/d) to join our dynamic team in our Prada Outlet in Roermond. As a Client Advisor (m/f/d), you will represent the Company towards customers and achieve the quantitative and qualitative objectives for the Department and the Store.

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

• Manage sales and optimize each step of the sales process.
 

• Understand the customer’s needs, both expressed and hidden.
 

• Present and value the product range.
 

• Boost cross-selling and additional sales.
 

• Ensure the correct management (cleaning, care, replacement) of the products in the department.
 
 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 Passion for human relations and sales

 
 Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion, art and design

 
 Experience of building a long-lasting relationship with clients

 
 Being able to work in team as well as alone

 
 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 
 Passion and knowledge of the managed product category

 
 Fluent spoken English expected

 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth.
Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: STAGE HR Talent Acquisition
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Church’s and Car Shoe brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 
We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Talent Acquisition Intern to join our team at Industrial HQ in Tuscany (Terranuova Bracciolini, AR). In this position, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring an excellent candidate experience by serving as a primary point of contact throughout the entire selection process. The internship offers the opportunity to gain comprehensive exposure to the full recruitment cycle and broader HR activities across various business areas (Leather Goods, Shoes, RTW, and Corporate functions), within a dynamic and international environment. 

 
 

 
 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 

• Publish job ads on various platforms, screen CVs, organize and conduct phone/video interviews and prepare candidate evaluation reports; 
 

• Conduct active sourcing of candidates through LinkedIn and internal/external databases; 
 

• Manage the Applicant Tracking System (ATS) for candidate pipeline and recruitment process monitoring. 
 

• Build and maintain relationships with schools, universities and career services for employer branding and talent attraction. 
 

• Create and nurture a talent pool of promising candidates to stay in touch with for future opportunities 
 

• Support recruitment reporting and analytics to monitor key metrics and process effectiveness.

 
 
 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 
Master’s Degree in Work Psychology/ Human Resources/ Management or from humanities faculties
Genuine interest in Recruitment and Talent Acquisition (A previous experience in HR or Recruiting will be considered as a plus)
Proactive, detail-oriented and able to manage multiple tasks in a dynamic environment
Fluent in Italian and English 
Good knowledge of Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, PowerPoint etc.)
Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build positive relationships with candidates and colleagues 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.description:
Fondato nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada si è costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione di innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in oltre 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa e conta dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. 

 
 

 
 

 SCOPO 

 
 

 
 Il/La Performance Apparel Product Developer/Development Assistant fa parte del team Sviluppo Prodotto Abbigliamento di Prada Linea Rossa e ricopre un ruolo centrale nello sviluppo di capi di abbigliamento tecnico e di performance, contribuendo a trasformare la visione creativa in prodotti concreti, innovativi e industrializzabili. 

 
 Questa figura combina competenze tecniche, sensibilità per il prodotto e capacità organizzative per garantire che ogni capo risponda ai più elevati standard di qualità, performance e coerenza estetica del brand. 

 
 L’Apparel Product Developer lavora in stretta sinergia con Design, Modelleria, Produzione e fornitori esterni, accompagnando il prodotto lungo tutto il ciclo di sviluppo: dal concept iniziale alla validazione finale del prodotto. 

 
 Il ruolo prevede un forte focus su materiali performance (waterproof, traspiranti, termici, stretch) e soluzioni costruttive innovative. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSABIILITÀ: 

 
 

 
 

• Collaborare con il Senior Product Developer e il team Design per tradurre i concept creativi in specifiche tecniche dettagliate, garantendo fattibilità, coerenza stilistica e sostenibilità industriale del prodotto. 
 

• Gestire e supervisionare l’intero processo di sviluppo prodotto, dal lancio dei prototipi fino alla validazione dei prodotti finali, assicurando il rispetto delle tempistiche, dei costi e degli standard qualitativi. 
 

• Coordinare lo sviluppo di capi tecnici ad alte prestazioni, con particolare attenzione a materiali innovativi (waterproof, traspiranti, termici, stretch) e soluzioni costruttive avanzate. 
 

• Interfacciarsi con modellisti, fornitori e partner produttivi, sia in Italia che all’estero, per la condivisione delle specifiche tecniche, la raccolta di feedback e la gestione delle revisioni prodotto. 
 

• Guidare le attività di fitting e revisione dei prototipi, identificando e implementando miglioramenti tecnici e costruttivi per ottimizzare performance, vestibilità e qualità. 
 

• Inserire e aggiornare dati tecnici, distinte base (BOM), specifiche materiali e documentazione prodotto all’interno dei sistemi PLM, garantendo accuratezza e tracciabilità delle informazioni. 
 

• Supportare l’introduzione di nuovi materiali, finiture e soluzioni tecnologiche in collaborazione con Design ed ente Materials, in linea con i trend di mercato e le esigenze del consumatore contemporaneo. 
 

• Coordinare stakeholder interni ed esterni durante le diverse fasi del progetto, facilitando la comunicazione e assicurando un flusso di lavoro efficiente e strutturato. 
 

• Organizzare e mantenere aggiornato l’archivio dei prototipi e dei campioni, contribuendo alla costruzione di uno storico tecnico di riferimento per le collezioni future. 
 

• Garantire che ogni prodotto sviluppato rispecchi gli standard qualitativi, tecnici ed estetici del brand, contribuendo all’eccellenza complessiva della collezione. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 REQUISITI: 

 
 

 
 Diploma e/o Laurea in ambito Moda, Design Industriale o equivalenti 

 
 3/4 anni di esperienza in ambito Sviluppo Prodotto abbigliamento sportivo/tecnico ad alte prestazioni e innovazione 

 
 Ottima dimestichezza con sistemi PLM e pacchetto Office (in particolare Excel) 

 
 Capacità organizzative, precisione e orientamento al dettaglio 

 
 Ottima conoscenza della lingua Inglese e Italiana 

 
 Spiccata propensione all’innovazione, con interesse per nuove tecnologie, materiali avanzati e soluzioni di design sperimentali 

 
 Capacità di lavorare in team multidisciplinari e di gestire progetti complessi 

 

 
 

 
 Entrare a far parte della nostra Azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell'eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che diamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, favorendone la crescita professionale. 
 Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità a tutti i candidati, indipendentemente da genere, etnia, orientamento sessuale, disabilità, o altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un ambiente di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti.

descriptionByLocale.en: Description Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in over 45 countries with the brands PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa and employs over 100 nationalities. ## Mansioni The Performance Apparel Product Developer/Development Assistant is part of the Prada Linea Rossa Product Development team and plays a central role in the development of technical clothing and performance, helping to transform creative vision into concrete, innovative and industrialized products. This figure combines technical skills, product sensitivity and organizational skills to ensure that each garment meets the highest quality standards, performance and aesthetic consistency of the brand. The Apparel Product Developer works in close synergy with Design, Modelling, Production and external suppliers, accompanying the product throughout the development cycle: from the initial concept to the final validation of the product. The role includes a strong focus on performance materials (waterproof, breathable, thermal, stretch) and innovative construction solutions. ## Responsibility - Collaboration with the Senior Product Developer and Design team to translate creative concepts into detailed technical specifications, ensuring feasibility, stylistic consistency and industrial sustainability of the product. - Manage and oversee the entire product development process, from the launch of prototypes to the validation of final products, ensuring compliance with timing, costs and quality standards. - Coordinate the development of high-performance technical garments, with particular attention to innovative materials (waterproof, breathable, thermal, stretch) and advanced construction solutions. - Interface with models, suppliers and productive partners, both in Italy and abroad, for the sharing of technical specifications, the collection of feedback and the management of product reviews. - Drive fitting and revision of prototypes, identifying and implementing technical and constructive improvements to optimize performance, fit and quality. - Insert and update technical data, separate base (BOM), material specifications and documentation produced within PLM systems, ensuring accuracy and traceability of information. - Support the introduction of new materials, finishes and technological solutions in collaboration with Design and Materials body, in line with market trends and contemporary consumer needs. - Coordinate internal and external stakeholders during the different phases of the project, facilitating communication and ensuring an efficient and structured workflow. - Organize and maintain updated archives of prototypes and samples, contributing to the construction of a reference technical historian for future collections. - Ensure that each developed product meets the quality, technical and aesthetic standards of the brand, contributing to the overall excellence of the collection. ## Requirements - Diploma and/or Degree in Fashion, Industrial Design or equivalent - 3/4 years of experience in Development Product sportswear/technical high performance and innovation - Excellent familiarity with PLM systems and Office package (in particular Excel) - Organizational skills, precision and detail orientation - Great knowledge of the English and Italian language - Excited propensity to innovation, with interest in new technologies, advanced materials and solutions The engine of our success is the importance and value we give to the talent and passion of our people, encouraging their professional growth. The Prada Group promotes an inclusive working environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to building a fair and respectful working environment for all. Contact No information provided.

descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Fondé en 1913 en Italie, le groupe Prada s'est inspiré d'une tradition d'excellence et d'une vision d'innovation. Le Groupe, leader mondial du secteur du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa et emploie plus de 100 nationalités. ## Mansioni The Performance Apparel Product Developer/Development Assistant fait partie de l'équipe de développement de produits Prada Linea Rossa et joue un rôle central dans le développement de vêtements et de performances techniques, aidant à transformer la vision créative en produits concrets, innovants et industrialisés. Cette figure combine les compétences techniques, la sensibilité du produit et les compétences organisationnelles pour s'assurer que chaque vêtement répond aux normes de qualité les plus élevées, la performance et la cohérence esthétique de la marque. Le développeur de produits d'habillement travaille en étroite synergie avec des fournisseurs extérieurs, de la conception, de la modélisation et de la production, accompagnant le produit tout au long du cycle de développement : du concept initial à la validation finale du produit. Le rôle comprend une forte concentration sur les matériaux de performance (imperméable, respirant, thermique, stretch) et des solutions de construction innovantes. ## Responsabilité - Collaboration avec l'équipe principale de conception et de développement de produits pour traduire les concepts créatifs en spécifications techniques détaillées, assurant la faisabilité, la cohérence stylistique et la durabilité industrielle du produit. - Gérer et superviser l'ensemble du processus de développement des produits, depuis le lancement de prototypes jusqu'à la validation des produits finaux, en assurant le respect des délais, des coûts et des normes de qualité. - Coordonner le développement de vêtements techniques de haute performance, avec une attention particulière aux matériaux innovants (waterproof, respirant, thermique, stretch) et aux solutions de construction avancées. - Interface avec les modèles, les fournisseurs et les partenaires productifs, tant en Italie qu'à l'étranger, pour le partage des spécifications techniques, la collecte des retours et la gestion des évaluations de produits. - Montage et révision de prototypes, identification et mise en œuvre d'améliorations techniques et constructives pour optimiser les performances, l'ajustement et la qualité. - Insérer et mettre à jour les données techniques, la base séparée (BOM), les spécifications des matériaux et la documentation produite dans les systèmes PLM, assurant l'exactitude et la traçabilité des informations. - Soutenir l'introduction de nouveaux matériaux, finitions et solutions technologiques en collaboration avec l'organisme Design and Materials, en fonction des tendances du marché et des besoins contemporains des consommateurs. - Coordonner les parties prenantes internes et externes pendant les différentes phases du projet, en facilitant la communication et en assurant un flux de travail efficace et structuré. - Organiser et tenir à jour des archives de prototypes et d'échantillons, contribuant à la construction d'un historien technique de référence pour les futures collections. - S'assurer que chaque produit développé répond aux normes de qualité, technique et esthétique de la marque, contribuant à l'excellence globale de la collection. ## Exigences - Diplôme et/ou Diplôme en Mode, Design Industriel ou équivalent - 3/4 ans d'expérience en Développement Produit sportwear/technique haute performance et innovation - Excellente familiarité avec les systèmes PLM et le bloc bureau (en particulier Excel) - Compétences organisationnelles, précision et orientation détaillée - Grande connaissance de la langue anglaise et italienne - Propension à l'innovation, avec intérêt pour les nouvelles technologies, matériaux avancés et solutions Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de notre peuple, en favorisant leur développement professionnel. Le groupe Prada favorise un environnement de travail inclusif, assurant l'égalité des chances à tous les candidats, indépendamment du sexe, de l'origine ethnique, de l'orientation sexuelle, du handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles. Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous nous engageons à créer un environnement de travail juste et respectueux pour tous. Personne-ressource Aucune information fournie.

jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 As the Brand Store Manager, you are a passionate Brand Ambassador and a business leader, who conveys the Brand philosophy and values to the local market, the Store team and to the final Client. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 Leading the Business 

 
 

• Drive Store Team to exceed Financial targets and maximize sales performances, determining the success of the entire store 
 

• Propose and develop action plans, through careful analysis of performance 
 

• Drive the Store team to exceed their KPI targets, including cross selling and up selling among product categories 

 
 
 
 Client Development 

 
 

• Place the Client above all, leading by example to create a welcoming environment and to ensure the Team strives to meet their every need and request 
 

• Foster a Client centric mindset developing and maintaining solid Client relationships and enforcing meaningful after sales experiences 
 

• Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service through the execution of the “Brand Selling Ceremony” 
 
 
 

 
 Team Management 

 
 

• Act as a strong Staff motivator, promoting team spırıt through effective communication, and cultivating a positive and energetic environment, even to the eyes of the Client 
 

• Encourage the exchange of information within the team and proactively develop morning briefing on specific topics 
 

• Master fully all company tools and applications including IT and digital, and ensure team is constantly informed of relevant updates 
 

• Understand the needs and priorities, train and inspire the Store team on product knowledge, sales techniques, Client Services, and Company policies and procedures 
 
 
 

 
 Boutique Care 

 
 

• Lead by example to ensure the Team operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Product, evident in every ceremony or procedure 
 

• Ensure display attracts Clients and maximizes sales, in accordance with Company guidelines – proactively seek VM and MD support based on store needs 
 

• Provıde feedback and suggestions when necessary to the Visual Merchandising and the Retail Merchandising departments 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 
 

 
 At least 8 years of experience 

 
 Strong problem-solving and organizational skills 

 
 Ability to manage multiple priorities and coordinate across functions 

 
 Excellent communication skills and team spirit 

 
 Fluency in both Italian and English 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Fondata nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada è stato costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione di innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in più di 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa, e ha dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. ## Mansioni ## Brand Store Manager Come Brand Store Manager, sei un ambasciatore appassionato del marchio e un leader aziendale, che trasmette la filosofia e i valori del marchio al mercato locale, al team del negozio e al cliente finale. ## Responsabilità - Leading the Business - Guidare il team del negozio a superare gli obiettivi finanziari e massimizzare le prestazioni di vendita, determinando il successo dell'intero negozio - Proporre e sviluppare piani d'azione, attraverso un'attenta analisi delle prestazioni - Guidare il team del negozio a superare i loro obiettivi KPI, inclusa la vendita incrociata e la vendita di prodotti tra categorie - Client Development - Mettere il cliente al di sopra di tutto, guidando con l'esempio per creare un ambiente accogliente e garantire che il team si impegni a soddisfare ogni esigenza e richiesta del cliente - Favorire una mentalità centrata sul cliente, sviluppando e mantenendo solide relazioni con i clienti e garantendo esperienze di vendita significative dopo la vendita - Garantire un'elevata soddisfazione del cliente e il massimo livello di servizio al cliente attraverso l'esecuzione della "Cerimonia di vendita del marchio" - Team Management - Agire da forte motivatore del personale, promuovendo lo spirito di squadra attraverso una comunicazione efficace e creando un ambiente positivo ed energetico, anche agli occhi del cliente - Incoraggiare la condivisione di informazioni all'interno del team e sviluppare proattivamente briefing mattutini su argomenti specifici - Padroneggiare tutti gli strumenti e le applicazioni aziendali, inclusi IT e digitali, e garantire che il team sia costantemente informato sugli aggiornamenti pertinenti - Comprendere le esigenze e le priorità, formare e ispirare il team del negozio sulla conoscenza del prodotto, sulle tecniche di vendita, sui servizi al cliente e sulle politiche e procedure aziendali - Boutique Care - Guidare con l'esempio per garantire che il team operi con il massimo livello di cura e rispetto per il prodotto, evidente in ogni cerimonia o procedura - Garantire che la vetrina attiri i clienti e massimizzi le vendite, in conformità con le linee guida aziendali - cercare proattivamente supporto da VM e MD in base alle esigenze del negozio - Fornire feedback e suggerimenti quando necessario ai dipartimenti di Visual Merchandising e Retail Merchandising ## Requisiti - Almeno 8 anni di esperienza - Forti capacità di problem-solving e organizzazione - Capacità di gestire multiple priorità e coordinare tra funzioni - Eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e spirito di squadra - Fluente in entrambe le lingue italiana e inglese ## Cosa offriamo Unirsi alla nostra azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell'eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che attribuiamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, portando alla loro crescita professionale. Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità per tutti i candidati, indipendentemente dal genere, dall'etnia, dall'orientamento sessuale, dalla disabilità o da altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un luogo di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti. ## Contatto

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Gegründet 1913 in Italien, wurde die Prada Group auf einer Tradition von Exzellenz und mit einer Vision von Innovation aufgebaut. Die Gruppe, ein weltweiter Marktführer im Luxussegment, operiert in mehr als 45 Ländern mit den Marken PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe und Luna Rossa und beschäftigt Mitarbeiter aus über 100 Nationalitäten. ## Aufgaben ## Brand Store Manager Als Brand Store Manager sind Sie ein leidenschaftlicher Markenbotschafter und ein Unternehmensführer, der die Philosophie und die Werte der Marke an den lokalen Markt, das Store-Team und den Endkunden übermittelt. ## Verantwortlichkeiten - Leading the Business - Das Store-Team dazu bringen, die finanziellen Ziele zu übertreffen und die Verkaufsleistungen zu maximieren, um den Erfolg des gesamten Stores zu bestimmen - Aktionspläne vorschlagen und entwickeln, durch sorgfältige Analyse der Leistungen - Das Store-Team dazu bringen, ihre KPI-Ziele zu übertreffen, einschließlich Cross-Selling und Upselling zwischen Produktkategorien - Client Development - Den Kunden über alles stellen, indem Sie mit gutem Beispiel vorangehen, um eine einladende Umgebung zu schaffen und sicherzustellen, dass das Team sich bemüht, jede Notwendigkeit und Anfrage des Kunden zu erfüllen - Eine klientenzentrierte Denkweise fördern, indem Sie solide Kundenbeziehungen aufbauen und aufrechterhalten und sinnvolle Nachverkaufserfahrungen durchsetzen - Eine ausgezeichnete Kundenzufriedenheit und den höchsten Level an Kundenservice durch die Ausführung der "Markenverkaufszermonie" gewährleisten - Team Management - Als starker Mitarbeiter motivator fungieren, indem Sie Teamspirit durch effektive Kommunikation fördern und eine positive und energetische Umgebung schaffen, auch für die Kunden - Den Informationsaustausch innerhalb des Teams fördern und proaktiv Morgenbriefings zu spezifischen Themen entwickeln - Alle Unternehmenswerkzeuge und -anwendungen, einschließlich IT und digital, beherrschen und sicherstellen, dass das Team ständig über relevante Updates informiert ist - Die Bedürfnisse und Prioritäten verstehen, das Store-Team in Produktkenntnissen, Verkaufstechniken, Kundenservice und Unternehmensrichtlinien und -verfahren schulen und inspirieren - Boutique Care - Mit gutem Beispiel vorangehen, um sicherzustellen, dass das Team mit dem höchsten Level an Sorgfalt und Respekt für das Produkt arbeitet, offensichtlich in jeder Zeremonie oder Prozedur - Sicherstellen, dass die Schaufensterdekoration Kunden anzieht und den Verkauf maximiert, in Übereinstimmung mit Unternehmensrichtlinien - proaktiv VM- und MD-Unterstützung basierend auf den Bedürfnissen des Stores suchen - Feedback und Vorschläge geben, wenn notwendig, an die Abteilungen Visual Merchandising und Retail Merchandising ## Anforderungen - Mindestens 8 Jahre Erfahrung - Starke Problemlösungs- und Organisationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten und über Funktionen hinweg zu koordinieren - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Teamspirit - Fließend in beiden Sprachen, Italienisch und Englisch ## Was bieten wir Der Beitritt zu unserem Unternehmen bedeutet, in einer kreativen und internationalen Umgebung zu arbeiten, mit Teams von Menschen, die durch Neugier und die Suche nach Exzellenz motiviert sind. Der Motor unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und der Wert, den wir auf das Talent und die Leidenschaft unserer Mitarbeiter legen, was zu ihrem eigenen beruflichen Wachstum führt. Die Prada Group fördert eine inklusive Arbeitsumgebung, die gleiche Chancen für alle Kandidaten gewährleistet, unabhängig von Geschlecht, Ethnizität, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Merkmalen. Wir glauben, dass Vielfalt ein Wert ist und verpflichten uns, einen fairen und respektvollen Arbeitsplatz für alle zu schaffen. ## Kontakt

jobs.title: PRADA Store Manager, Zurich
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Church’s and Car Shoe brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 To be the owner of the business, a Company Brand Ambassador and a business leader, accountable for overall store performance. To guarantee an extraordinary Client experience, being present on the sales floor, leading and supporting all activities to achieve store targets. 

 
 To manage and coach the store team and to ensure succession plans and internal growth. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 BUSINESS 

 
 

• Drive and maximize sales performances. 
 

• Propose and develop business plans. 
 

• Drive the store team to exceed their KPIs. 
 

• Represent the Company on the local market, identifying new opportunities to increase customer footfall, attracts new Clients and builds a loyal relationship with the brand. 
 

• Be present on the sales floor, ensuring a proper approach and service to the Clients. 
 

• Foster the Omni Channel development through the team. 
 

• Meet the store-operating budget, controlling store expenses. 
 
 
 

 
 CUSTOMER 

 
 

• Foster a Client centric mindset by developing and maintaining solid Client relationships. 
 

• Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service. 
 

• Implement, in partnership with other company functions, clienteling initiatives and events, securing Client loyalty and increasing Client spending. 
 

• Foster a strong private appointment culture. 
 
 
 

 
 TEAM 

 
 

• Promote an entrepreneurial and team spirit using effective communication, ensuring efficient organization and professional growth. 
 

• Ensure the team is always prepared and updated on the Prada Group main information, product knowledge, local market, competitors, policies and procedures. 
 

• The ideal Store Manager is able to attract and recruit the best talents available on the market through networking and scouting. 
 
 
 

 
 RETAIL 

 
 

• Develop a proper sales strategy, in cooperation with the Retail Merchandising, Visual Merchandising and Retail Operations teams. 
 

• Ensures that the display attracts Clients and maximizes sales in accordance with Company guidelines. 
 

• Participate in the buying session when requested and in any case he/she provides effective product feedback based on store needs. 
 

• Ensure synergy and cooperation between front and back of house. 
 

• Is responsible for the enforcement of Company procedures on cash activity, inventory, logistics and all the main reporting activities requested by the head office. 
 
 
 

 
 EVENTS 

 
 

• Cooperate with the Retail Events Office for the organization of local events and defines a challenging and realistic target per Client, proposing new opportunities for local events in partnership with local Stakeholders and Influencers. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 Business driven 

 
 Leadership and team management 

 
 Ability to motivate and persuade people 

 
 Strong customer service mindset 

 
 Natural ability to welcome our client 

 
 Confident, enthusiastic and positive 

 
 Mature and assertive 

 
 Organized and detail oriented 

 
 Market and product knowledge/passion 

 
 Business/Retail Management degree or equivalent is a plus 

 
 Interest in luxury/fashion, art and design 

 
 Fluent spoken English expected. Other languages are desirable 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

To guarantee an extraordinary Client experience, being present on the sales floor, leading and supporting all activities to achieve store targets. To manage and coach the store team and to ensure succession plans and internal growth. RESPONSIBILITIES BUSINESS • Drive and maximize sales performances. • Propose and develop business plans. • Drive the store team to exceed their KPIs. • Represent the Company on the local market, identifying new opportunities to increase customer footfall, attracts new Clients and builds a loyal relationship with the brand. • Be present on the sales floor, ensuring a proper approach and service to the Clients. • Foster the Omni Channel development through the team. • Meet the store-operating budget, controlling store expenses. CUSTOMER • Foster a Client centric mindset by developing and maintaining solid Client relationships. • Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service. • Implement, in partnership with other company functions, clienteling initiatives and events, securing Client loyalty and increasing Client spending. • Foster a strong private appointment culture. TEAM • Promote an entrepreneurial and team spirit using effective communication, ensuring efficient organization and professional growth. • Ensure the team is always prepared and updated on the Prada Group main information, product knowledge, local market, competitors, policies and procedures. • The ideal Store Manager is able to attract and recruit the best talents available on the market through networking and scouting. RETAIL • Develop a proper sales strategy, in cooperation with the Retail Merchandising, Visual Merchandising and Retail Operations teams. • Ensures that the display attracts Clients and maximizes sales in accordance with Company guidelines. • Participate in the buying session when requested and in any case he/she provides effective product feedback based on store needs. • Ensure synergy and cooperation between front and back of house. • Is responsible for the enforcement of Company procedures on cash activity, inventory, logistics and all the main reporting activities requested by the head office. EVENTS • Cooperate with the Retail Events Office for the organization of local events and defines a challenging and realistic target per Client, proposing new opportunities for local events in partnership with local Stakeholders and Influencers. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Business driven Leadership and team management Ability to motivate and persuade people Strong customer service mindset Natural ability to welcome our client Confident, enthusiastic and positive Mature and assertive Organized and detail oriented Market and product knowledge/passion Business/Retail Management degree or equivalent is a plus Interest in luxury/fashion, art and design Fluent spoken English expected.
